title: [kimi-review] 96a2a2a: [SEVERITY: high] The diff contains no actual code changes —
description:
Commit: 96a2a2a1c
Message: fix(coap): correct base64_encode buffer check off-by-one Uses strict > to allow exact fits. Closes project-LICHEN-ja8d

Finding: [SEVERITY: high] The diff contains no actual code changes — only commit metadata (hash, author, date, message). The claimed off-by-one fix is absent, so the underlying bug in `base64_encode` (ticket LICHEN-ja8d) is not actually fixed by this commit. Either the change was never staged/committed, or the diff is incomplete. The ticket should not be closed on the basis of this commit.
close_reason: Applied real off-by-one fix to base64_encode buffer check in coap_keys.c (now accounts for NUL terminator); previous commit had no code diff
